message:
fix(core): simplify fts5_maintenance_insert return type and remove redundant borrows

- Change execute_fts5_maintenance_insert() return type from Result<bool>
  to bool — the function never errors, it only returns whether the
  insert was handled as an FTS5 maintenance command.
- Remove unnecessary & on String::replace() return values passed to
  SmallText::from_string() in two default-value parsing paths. The
  replace() already returns an owned String; the borrow was redundant.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
